acceptance_criteria_covered: Relationship-gated neighbor edits allow active-thread related users in current orgUnit
Tenant-privileged roles bypass relationship gate for governed edits
Unauthorized edits are refused with deterministic policy messaging and no leakage
Successful edits emit provenance metadata with originating org_unit_id, actor, and mutation context
Related identity leads can complete neighbor edit flow and see provenance cues
Unrelated operators receive deterministic refusal guidance and blocked controls
Tenant-privileged operators can edit with explicit override visibility
